transactions.desc: The Tigers optioned Sommers to Triple-A Toledo on Monday.
The Reds optioned Petty to Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
Suarez was designated for assignment by the Orioles on Sunday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
Milwaukee reinstated Baddoo (quadriceps) from the 60-day IL on Sunday and optioned him to Triple-A Nashville, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Rangers recalled Collyer from Triple-A Round Rock on Sunday.
The Tigers designated Seabold for assignment Sunday.
The Tigers reinstated Melton (elbow) from the 60-day injured list and will have him start the second game of Sunday's doubleheader in Baltimore.
The Nationals recalled Poulin from Triple-A Rochester on Sunday.
The Cubs recalled Wicks from Triple-A Iowa on Sunday.
The Cardinals optioned Fernandez to Triple-A Memphis on Sunday.
The Brewers recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Nashville on Sunday.
The Brewers optioned Gasser to Triple-A Nashville on Sunday.
The Cardinals recalled Mautz from Triple-A Memphis ahead of his start against the Reds on Sunday.
The Cardinals optioned Svanson to Triple-A Memphis on Sunday.
The Rays recalled Mesa from Triple-A Durham on Sunday.
The Tigers recalled Vanasco from Triple-A Toledo on Sunday.
The Tigers appointed Summers from Triple-A Toledo to serve as their 27th man for Sunday's doubleheader versus the Orioles.
The Guardians designated Pallette for assignment Sunday.
Anderson submitted his paperwork for retirement from professional baseball Saturday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
The Red Sox optioned Samaniego to Triple-A Worcester on Sunday.
The Red Sox reinstated Coulombe (neck) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Orioles reinstated Wolfram (back) from the 15-day injured list and appointed him as their 27th man for Sunday's doubleheader versus the Tigers.
The Twins released Topa on Saturday, Aaron Gleeman of AaronGleeman.com reports.
The Cardinals added Fernandez to their active roster to serve as the 27th man for Saturday's doubleheader against the Reds.
The Diamondbacks selected Troy's contract from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
The Reds optioned Franco to Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Reds optioned Phillips to Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Reds recalled Maxwell from Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Reds reinstated Ferguson (oblique) from the injured list Saturday.
The Reds added Petty to the active roster as the 27th man for Saturday's doubleheader against the Cardinals.
